name: Whiskas Adult Cat Pouches Fish M/Pak 12x85g
description: Give your cat the taste they crave and the nutrition they need with WHISKAS 1+ Fish Favourites Adult Cat Food in Jelly . Specially crafted to preserve the natural goodness and delicious flavour of premium fish ingredients, this complete and balanced wet cat food is designed to keep your feline healthy, active, and satisfied. Made with sustainably sourced fish and high-quality ingredients, each pouch provides your cat with essential nutrients that support overall well-being — from strong muscles to a shiny coat and healthy immune system. With irresistible fish flavours like salmon, tuna, whitefish, and cod, every meal is a moment of pure joy. Key Benefits Complete & Balanced Nutrition – Formulated to meet 100% of your adult cat’s daily nutritional requirements. • Healthy Skin & Coat – Enriched with zinc to promote soft, glossy fur and healthy skin. • Strong Muscles – Packed with high-quality protein to help maintain lean muscle mass and strength. • Supports Natural Defences – Contains vitamin C and essential antioxidants that boost immunity. • Sustainably Sourced Ingredients – Made with responsibly sourced fish to reduce environmental impact. • Irresistible Taste – Four delicious fish recipes in jelly your cat will love: salmon, tuna, whitefish, and cod. Ingredients With Salmon: Meat and animal derivatives (33%), fish and fish derivatives (including 4% salmon in the chunk*), cereals, minerals, derivatives of vegetable origin, various sugars. With Tuna: Meat and animal derivatives (33%), fish and fish derivatives (including 4% tuna in the chunk*), cereals, minerals, derivatives of vegetable origin, various sugars. With Whitefish: Meat and animal derivatives (33%), fish and fish derivatives (including 4% whitefish in the chunk*), cereals, minerals, derivatives of vegetable origin, various sugars. With Cod: Meat and animal derivatives (33%), fish and fish derivatives (including 4% cod in the chunk*), cereals, minerals, derivatives of vegetable origin, various sugars. *Chunk typically 40% of product. Guaranteed Analysis (Typical Nutritional Values per 100g) Nutrient Value Protein 7.8% Fat Content 4.0% Crude Fibre 0.25% Inorganic Matter 1.6% Moisture 84.5% Vitamin C 702 mg/kg Vitamin D₃ 200 IU (not supplemented in salmon and tuna varieties) Taurine 620 mg/kg Zinc 16.2 mg/kg Copper 1.2 mg/kg Iodine 0.22 mg/kg Iron 11.2 mg/kg Manganese 2.2 mg/kg Cassia Gum 2148 mg/kg   Why Choose WHISKAS 1+ Fish Favourites Expertly formulated for adult cats aged 1 year and above • Supports strong muscles, healthy coat, and natural defences • Made with 100% high-quality, sustainably sourced ingredients • Complete and balanced nutrition for daily feeding • Delicious fish flavours in a tender jelly texture cats adore Feeding & Usage Feed according to your cat’s weight, age, and activity level. For optimal nutrition, serve at room temperature and provide fresh drinking water at all times. Diet Transition When introducing WHISKAS 1+ Fish Favourites , gradually mix it with your cat’s current food over 7 days to allow their digestive system to adjust. Days 1–2: 25% new food / 75% old food Days 3–4: 50% new / 50% old Days 5–6: 75% new / 25% old Day 7+: 100% new food Maintain consistent feeding times and monitor your cat’s behaviour and appetite during the transition. Consult your veterinarian if any concerns arise. Storage Instructions Store unopened pouches in a cool, dry place away from direct sunlight. Once opened, refrigerate unused portions and consume within 48 hours . Give your cat the love they deserve with WHISKAS 1+ Fish Favourites — a tasty, nourishing meal made to support a lifetime of health, happiness, and purrs.
